name: dev.unity2foxglove.ros2forunity
description: Optional ROS2 For Unity adapter package for Unity2Foxglove. Provides facade, source-only adapter sample, docs, and diagnostics while runtime binaries live in separate runtime packages.

samples.description: Imports a source-only adapter sample that connects the Unity2Foxglove ROS2 facade to an externally imported ROS2 For Unity runtime.
